title: Linux Rare Process Execution by Host
description: Surfaces processes that have only been seen on a small number of hosts, which may indicate attacker tools, backdoors, or lateral movement payloads.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and 'Process Name' != null | stats distinctcount('Host Name') as host_count, count as exec_count by 'Process Name' | where host_count <= 2 and exec_count > 1 | sort -exec_count
notes: Processes seen on only 1-2 hosts are statistical outliers. Filter out known host-specific applications. Focus on processes in /tmp, /dev/shm, or non-standard paths.
